name: Roasted Mustard Potatoes-Daley
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Spray a roasting pan three times to coat with the vegetable oil.
3. Put the mustard, paprika, cumin, chili powder, and cayenne pepper in a large bowl. Whisk to blend.
4. Prick the potatoes several times with the tines of a fork and add them to the bowl. Toss to coat the potatoes evenly.
5. Pour the coated potatoes into the prepared roasting pan, leaving a little space between them.
6. Bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, until the potatoes are fork tender.
Fat per serving: .7 grams
Calories per serving: 37
